def negative_validation_only_happens_after_expensive_side_effect_has_started():
    rule_id = "validation_only_happens_after_expensive_side_effect_has_started"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag flows where validation happens only after I/O or irreversible work has begun."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
